executives.name: C.C. Wei
executives.background: Dr. C.C. Wei is the Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of TSMC. Prior to becoming Chairman in June 2024, he served as CEO since 2018 and President and Co-CEO from 2013 to 2018. He joined TSMC in 1998 and has held various senior positions in operations and R&D. He holds a Ph.D. in electrical engineering from Yale University.

executives.name: Wendell Huang
executives.background: Wendell Huang is the Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of TSMC. He joined TSMC in 1999 and has served in various financial roles, including Deputy CFO. Before TSMC, he worked in investment banking at Chase Manhattan Bank. He holds an MBA from Cornell University.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: L.C. Tu
executives.background: Dr. L.C. Tu is a Vice President and the Chief Information Officer at TSMC. He is responsible for the company's information technology strategy and infrastructure. He joined TSMC in 2003 and has held leadership roles in IT and manufacturing systems.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President and Chief Information Officer

board_of_directors.name: C.C. Wei
board_of_directors.background: Chairman and CEO of TSMC. See executive profile for details.

board_of_directors.name: F.C. Tseng
board_of_directors.background: Dr. F.C. Tseng is a Director and former Vice Chairman of TSMC. He was one of the co-founders of TSMC and served as President from 1998 to 2005. He holds a Ph.D. in Electrical Engineering from National Cheng Kung University.

board_of_directors.name: Sir Peter L. Bonfield
board_of_directors.background: Sir Peter Bonfield is an Independent Director. He was formerly the CEO of British Telecommunications and Chairman and CEO of ICL plc. He has extensive experience in the international technology and telecommunications industries.

board_of_directors.name: Moshe N. Gavrielov
board_of_directors.background: Moshe Gavrielov is an Independent Director. He was the President and CEO of Xilinx, Inc. from 2008 to 2018. He has over 40 years of experience in the semiconductor industry, including roles at Cadence Design Systems and LSI Logic.

board_of_directors.name: Ursula M. Burns
board_of_directors.background: Ursula Burns is an Independent Director. She was the Chairman and CEO of Xerox Corporation and VEON Ltd. She is a member of the National Academy of Engineering and serves on several other boards including Uber and Endeavor.

sources.source_description: SEC Form 20-F Annual Report for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2023
